cards.code: using System; Type t = Type.GetType("System.Int32"); Console.WriteLine(t.Name); Console.WriteLine(t.Namespace);

cards.prompt: Box{public A; private B; public M(); private N();}: GetMembers public vs +nonpublic (Instance|DeclaredOnly)?
cards.code: using System; using System.Reflection; class Box { public int A; private int B; public void M(){} private void N(){} } Type t = typeof(Box); var scope = BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.DeclaredOnly; Console.WriteLine($"public-only: {t.GetMembers(scope | BindingFlags.Public).Length}"); Console.WriteLine($"+ nonpublic: {t.GetMembers(scope | BindingFlags.Public | BindingFlags.NonPublic).Length}");

cards.prompt: GetMembers(Public) без Instance/Static vs с Instance|DeclaredOnly?
cards.code: using System; using System.Reflection; class Box { public int A; } Type t = typeof(Box); Console.WriteLine(t.GetMembers(BindingFlags.Public).Length); Console.WriteLine(t.GetMembers(BindingFlags.Public | BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.DeclaredOnly).Length);
